subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath been illumined by the lights of the Most Great Countenance and, through the favoring glance of the Lord of Power, hath attained unto presence before the Face [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتابت بانوار منظر اکبر مشرف و بلحاظ عنایت مالک قدر فائز بحضور کتابک لدی الوجه غفر
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @suffering and imprisonment, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
